translation_findings.issue: JP '供用' (supplying/making-available) rendered as 'using' in p080::2 EN definition; table row uses 'supplying'. Mild internal inconsistency — does not change legal meaning materially.
translation_findings.recommended_fix: Harmonize to 'supplying' or 'making available for use' across both occurrences.

narrative: Table + 5 term entries on security laws. OCR table preserved; all proper-noun translations (NISC, METI guidelines) accurate. ZH '面向中小企业' / EN 'SME' consistent. Only one minor EN inconsistency.
